capture_method: direct fetch -A "cdo-preserve/1.0" across 61 ecosystem category pages; project link data parsed from each page __NEXT_DATA__; SHA-256 over the concatenated captured pages, bytes not stored
notes: Built on Cardano ecosystem category pages. Used to enrich Project Memory with sourced project links (website/github/documentation/whitepaper) for 510 projects. Audit links are not exposed by this source and were not added.
